summary: Phase 3 Accounting Sync (Luca Integration) - All Tests Passing. 14/14 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI fully functional with Muhasebe Senkronizasyon dashboard, Luca credential settings, and Luca sync buttons on e-Fatura page.
critical_code_review_comments: Luca adapter (luca_integrator.py) implements BaseAccountingIntegrator ABC with test_connection, sync_invoice, get_sync_status, create_customer methods
SIMULATION MODE: Luca API is unreachable so adapter returns simulated responses with LUCA-xxx external refs
Idempotency implemented: duplicate sync returns error='duplicate' instead of creating new record
Credential encryption: Uses same AES-256-GCM from tenant_integrator_service as Phase 2 EDM
Accounting sync service (accounting_sync_service.py) implements queue_invoice_for_sync, execute_sync, retry_sync with proper status tracking
Dashboard endpoint returns total_syncs, success, failed, pending counts plus provider configuration status

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, Settings panel, Luca sync all working)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed invoice and credential data for isolated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Luca accounting integration fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/accounting/providers (returns Luca with credential_fields), POST /api/accounting/credentials (save with encryption), GET /api/accounting/credentials (list masked), POST /api/accounting/test-connection (simulation mode success), DELETE /api/accounting/credentials/{provider}, POST /api/accounting/sync/{invoice_id} (sync issued invoice, returns LUCA-xxx ref), POST /api/accounting/retry (retry failed sync), GET /api/accounting/sync-logs (with status filter), GET /api/accounting/dashboard (stats). Frontend at /app/admin/accounting shows dashboard with sync stats, logs table, settings panel for Luca credentials. E-Fatura page at /app/admin/efatura has MUHASEBE column showing Luca sync status and Luca sync buttons on issued invoices.

backend_apis.GET /api/accounting/providers: PASS - returns Luca with credential_fields (username, password, company_id, endpoint)
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/credentials: PASS - saves credentials with AES-256-GCM encryption
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/test-connection: PASS - Luca connection test returns simulated success
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/sync/{invoice_id}: PASS - syncs issued invoice to Luca (simulation)
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/sync/{id} duplicate: PASS - returns error='duplicate' on second sync (idempotent)
backend_apis.GET /api/accounting/sync-logs: PASS - returns logs with total count
backend_apis.GET /api/accounting/dashboard: PASS - returns total_syncs, success, failed, pending, providers status

frontend_pages.Muhasebe Senkronizasyon page (/app/admin: PASS - Dashboard shows sync stats, logs table, Ayarlar button
frontend_pages.Luca Settings Panel: PASS - Opens on Ayarlar click, shows credential form with username/password/company_id/endpoint fields
frontend_pages.Save Luca Credentials: PASS - Kaydet button saves credentials, toast notification shown
frontend_pages.Sync Logs Table: PASS - Shows SYNC ID, Fatura No, Saglayici, Durum, Ref, Deneme, Hata, Tarih, Aksiyon columns
frontend_pages.E-Fatura page (/app/admin/efatura): PASS - MUHASEBE column visible in invoice table
frontend_pages.Luca Sync Button: PASS - Luca button visible on issued invoices, clicking triggers sync
frontend_pages.Luca Sync Toast: PASS - Shows 'Luca senkronizasyonu tamamlandi' on success

mocked_apis.luca_api: SIMULATION MODE - Luca adapter cannot reach real https://api.lfrcloud.com/api/v1, returns simulated responses with LUCA-xxx refs and [SIMULASYON] message
